content.json:
# Network Availability — Connection Monitor Reachability & Latency
**Theme:** Network availability · **Data source:** `NWConnectionMonitorTestResult` (Network Watcher Connection Monitor; falls back to `NetworkMonitoring` for Connection Monitor v1).

Reachability pass/fail, round-trip time, and packet loss between monitored source→destination pairs.

> Requires Connection Monitor to be configured. Column names are connector-dependent — verify before alerting.

content.query: NWConnectionMonitorTestResult | summarize Total=count(), Failed=countif(TestResult == 'Fail') by TestGroupName, DestinationName | extend FailPct=round(100.0 * Failed / Total, 2) | sort by FailPct desc
content.title: Pass/fail % by test group & destination

content.query: NWConnectionMonitorTestResult | summarize AvgRTT=avg(AvgRoundTripTimeMs), P95RTT=percentile(MaxRoundTripTimeMs, 95) by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m) | render timechart
content.title: Round-trip time (avg / p95) over time

content.query: NWConnectionMonitorTestResult | where TestResult == 'Fail' | summarize Failures=count() by SourceName, DestinationName, DestinationPort | top 100 by Failures desc
content.title: Failed checks by source → destination

content.query: NWConnectionMonitorTestResult | where ChecksTotal > 0 | extend LossPct=round(100.0 * ChecksFailed / ChecksTotal, 2) | where LossPct > 0 | summarize AvgLossPct=avg(LossPct) by SourceName, DestinationName | sort by AvgLossPct desc
content.title: Checks with packet loss
